task_completion.description: Apply a 90-degree clockwise rotation to the DICOM image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM image in the viewer appears rotated 90 degrees clockwise compared to its initial state, or the UI button/menu item for 90-degree clockwise rotation is actively clicked.

task_completion.description: Apply a horizontal flip to the DICOM image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM image in the viewer appears horizontally mirrored, or the UI button/menu item for horizontal flip is actively clicked.

task_completion.description: Open the export or save dialog in the DICOM viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export', 'Save As', or similar dialog box is visible on the screen within the DICOM viewer application.

task_completion.description: Select PNG as the export format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file type or format dropdown in the export/save dialog is set to 'PNG' or 'image/png'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct export file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path or name field in the save dialog contains '~/DICOM/exports/corrected_orientation.png' or '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/corrected_orientation.png'.
The 'Save', 'Export', or 'OK' button is clicked in the dialog after the correct path and format have been configured, or a success message is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent used the DICOM viewer's graphical interface to manipulate the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions (clicks, menu selections) occur within the DICOM viewer application (e.g., Weasis) rather than relying on external scripts.

integrity.description: The image visually changes in the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main image display area updates to show the rotated and flipped states of the X-Ray/CT scan.

integrity.description: The agent did not use command-line image processing tools to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands like 'convert', 'mogrify', or python scripts being executed to rotate, flip, or export the image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export path is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/corrected_orientation.png'. The expected export format is PNG.
